artPrompt: An evocative scene of an entire carnival game floor canted at a sly slant, dice and hot-gold coins all rolling inexorably toward a shadowed house counter, tattered tents and rigged wheels leaning with the tilt under lurid neon. Ember sparks drift through smoky black haze along the warped boards. Dramatic dutch-angle film-still framing emphasizing the crooked pull, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: The Tilted Table
text:
The whole game floor is on a gentle slant toward the house.
Whenever any player rolls a die and would keep a result of 6, that player must instead reroll it once. (The table is tilted. The dice know which way is down. The house decided which way is down.)
Whenever a die is rerolled this way, you create a Treasure token.
flavorText: Spirit levels placed on the floor have all quietly resigned.
